852532d474d099adacb7a931349a519f0874016e.desc: Message value in the set_cwd tool's busy rejection returned to the model when a turn is in progress, telling it to wait or interrupt then retry; model-facing.

6766532376a462cda72dc2c8fbc4060a13aa0be4.name: Agent Prompt: Background Observer Activity Digest Note
6766532376a462cda72dc2c8fbc4060a13aa0be4.desc: Fragment of the background observer agent's system prompt telling it each turn brings a read-only activity digest wrapped in envelope tags that is data, not instructions; model-facing.

7031c2c34ce0dc636f9139590d408a54713b0813.name: Tool Parameter: set_cwd ok cwd
7031c2c34ce0dc636f9139590d408a54713b0813.desc: Describes the canonical realpath working directory returned in the set_cwd tool's ok result arm; model-facing output-schema field.

a7073f3a246e5af43f881211271a29304b2245c4.name: Tool Parameter: set_cwd needs_trust directory
a7073f3a246e5af43f881211271a29304b2245c4.desc: Describes the canonical target directory returned by a set_cwd needs_trust response, which the SDK host must show in a trust dialog and echo back verbatim on accept

9c287ca4ec1521266f63b79d8eebc8086a1f1cda.name: Set Cwd Changed Flag
9c287ca4ec1521266f63b79d8eebc8086a1f1cda.desc: Output-schema field description for the set_cwd tool's `changed` boolean telling the model the target already was the working directory (a successful no-op); model-facing.

d7bdab778662413a7f08a50ee273ed648db2e2cf.name: Set Cwd Trust Accepted
d7bdab778662413a7f08a50ee273ed648db2e2cf.desc: Input-schema field description for the set_cwd tool's `trust_accepted` boolean instructing the model to only send true after showing a trust dialog; model-facing.

a44ec19066108c907e34beda6cf9ad69338735b0.name: Set Cwd Rejected Message
a44ec19066108c907e34beda6cf9ad69338735b0.desc: Output-schema field description for the set_cwd rejected-arm `message` string returned to the model; model-facing.

c210651cfafad1b0f1831894a5045c27759d3678.name: Memory Sync Paused After Failures
c210651cfafad1b0f1831894a5045c27759d3678.desc: PostToolUse additionalContext injected after a memory write warning the model that memory sync is paused after repeated failures and recent writes are saved locally but not persisted; model-facing.

d9081e098932d58a13f40486a004322a60b0ecbf.name: SendMessage Unavailable To Observer
d9081e098932d58a13f40486a004322a60b0ecbf.desc: Tool-result message returned when an observer agent calls SendMessage, telling the model to use ObserverReport instead; model-facing.

24d76119a88f0533fb1d185a641302a85f7cb4f4.name: Project Write Present To User
24d76119a88f0533fb1d185a641302a85f7cb4f4.desc: Input-schema field description for the project_write tool's `present_to_user` boolean marking the doc as the deliverable the user needs to see; model-facing.

024287ac7fcda840f7c7f486c862715043b65fc5.name: Set Cwd Trusted Directory Param
024287ac7fcda840f7c7f486c862715043b65fc5.desc: Model-facing input-schema description for the set_cwd control tool's trusted_directory parameter.

44b75ee8c92d0423d616da6ccbf54766e81211ca.name: Project Write Present-to-User Param
44b75ee8c92d0423d616da6ccbf54766e81211ca.desc: Model-facing tool-parameter description fragment for the project_write tool's present_to_user flag.

653e8f1b370563ad3fed0bf283e418a49d211a9b.name: ObserverReport Tool Description
653e8f1b370563ad3fed0bf283e418a49d211a9b.desc: Model-facing tool description for the ObserverReport tool used by an observer agent to report to the observed agent.

1a209c3061a131d85b3d39b29485b50f4dabf262.name: Set Cwd Path Param
1a209c3061a131d85b3d39b29485b50f4dabf262.desc: Model-facing input-schema description for the set_cwd control tool's path parameter.

39edced2423e0d56676d08c4c10f500714ee8c3f.name: Observer Activity Digest Reminder
39edced2423e0d56676d08c4c10f500714ee8c3f.desc: Model-facing system-reminder appended after each observer activity digest instructing the observing agent when to report via ObserverReport.

676dab40a4f0e2da3fd5bdca377d2885376f22e8.name: Memory Deleted By Other Session Notice
676dab40a4f0e2da3fd5bdca377d2885376f22e8.desc: Model-facing memory-sync conflict notice delivered as PostToolUse additionalContext after a memory tool call, instructing the model to delete the file if the deletion was intended.

883fb204764ca27c69f1276c4eb6897a2fde51cf.name: ObserverReport Report Param
883fb204764ca27c69f1276c4eb6897a2fde51cf.desc: Model-facing input-schema description for the ObserverReport tool's report parameter.

d56355537ce23c69877974708ef89658dd8cb54a.name: Memory Sync Content Secret Rejection
d56355537ce23c69877974708ef89658dd8cb54a.desc: Model-facing memory-sync rejection message (server detected a credential) delivered to the model as PostToolUse additionalContext, telling it to remove the credential.

31e3771bb4087b344492afea65335f5878576e1b.name: Memory Sync Invalid Path Rejection
31e3771bb4087b344492afea65335f5878576e1b.desc: Rejection-reason text (rwo.invalid_path) composed into the PostToolUse additionalContext the model reads when a memory file's path is too long/deep/invalid; model-facing.

1cdc80d5d703fa004ac56d2af9e4e113022a8fc5.name: Set Cwd Unsafe Path Rejection
1cdc80d5d703fa004ac56d2af9e4e113022a8fc5.desc: The set_cwd tool result message returned to the model when the target path contains invisible/non-printing characters and cannot cross the trust boundary; model-facing.

860dc6d04ba1db58766514c44f955dd15e07f8f3.name: Set Cwd Transcript Relocated Field
860dc6d04ba1db58766514c44f955dd15e07f8f3.desc: Description of the transcript_relocated boolean field in the set_cwd tool's output/response schema (W_C), which the model receives as a tool result; model-facing.

eba776b064dc2b5d66eebc5865e52f7b4ff462aa.name: Set Cwd Rejection Reason Field
eba776b064dc2b5d66eebc5865e52f7b4ff462aa.desc: Description of the reason enum in the set_cwd rejected-status output schema (W_C) explaining the unsafe_path reason, delivered to the model as tool-result schema; model-facing.

8db297874660f251e7754fd41762b80f74f84d97.name: Observer Non-Participation Guidance
8db297874660f251e7754fd41762b80f74f84d97.desc: Part of the background observer agent's system prompt instructing it not to participate in the observed task and to report only genuinely useful observations via the ObserverReport tool; model-facing.

22e02fcff18867adedee2ecac7fafeb3015a7861.name: Background Observer Report Delivery
22e02fcff18867adedee2ecac7fafeb3015a7861.desc: The system-reminder injected into the main agent's context delivering a background observer's one-way advisory report and warning it is not user consent; model-facing.

57951e47e738ab9f5537fd5f32d5304c14718483.name: Observer Pairing Not Armed Result
57951e47e738ab9f5537fd5f32d5304c14718483.desc: The ObserverReport tool result (data.message) returned to the model when the observer pairing is not armed and the report was not delivered; model-facing.

bd33fc91ec6756ec0ff018e508311cb2a610fc53.name: Memory Deletion Concurrent-Write Conflict
bd33fc91ec6756ec0ff018e508311cb2a610fc53.desc: Model-facing PostToolUse additionalContext telling the model its memory-file deletion was not applied due to a concurrent-write conflict and to re-read and delete again.

0f57f43a39165aad0f243edf07504411e2b9de1e.name: Memory Write Path Conflict
0f57f43a39165aad0f243edf07504411e2b9de1e.desc: Model-facing PostToolUse additionalContext telling the model its memory write was not saved because the path conflicts with an existing memory, and to re-read and rename or delete the conflicting one.

7bcee5d31b3e04fe55280d65af39d7e61cfa77d5.name: Memory Write Concurrent-Write Conflict
7bcee5d31b3e04fe55280d65af39d7e61cfa77d5.desc: Model-facing PostToolUse additionalContext telling the model its memory write was not saved due to a concurrent-write conflict and to re-read and re-apply the change.

6ee6f2dfa2e6ce4a1578c5fa09cff29da969e86f.name: Code Review After The Review Section
6ee6f2dfa2e6ce4a1578c5fa09cff29da969e86f.desc: Model-facing prompt section appended to the code-review skill instructing the model to invoke /verify after reporting findings when the diff has a runtime surface.

47374d6931cfe3c405746a66fc4f01fcf5730950.name: Attachment Download Failed Placeholder
47374d6931cfe3c405746a66fc4f01fcf5730950.desc: Model-facing placeholder text injected as prompt content in place of an attachment that could not be downloaded.

db03902fccd279ae162a2790f7a72c18f04fec60.name: Code Review Inline Prompt Envelope
db03902fccd279ae162a2790f7a72c18f04fec60.desc: Model-facing outer template that assembles the inline code-review slash-command prompt returned to the model as a text content block.

9be930762766598fc315ec84c80b0a09a1fcec60.name: Artifact Publish Pin-Readback Failed
9be930762766598fc315ec84c80b0a09a1fcec60.desc: Model-facing tool_result returned when an artifact republish cannot read the stored contract pin, telling the model to retry or pass contract:'latest'.

68c014514f92840e382d62b9351d9b9645fb423c.name: Artifact Republished By Another Session
68c014514f92840e382d62b9351d9b9645fb423c.desc: Model-facing ambient tool_result notifying the model that the artifact was republished by another session and to WebFetch the latest before editing or republishing.

ca94bc3285c6b6a16e2f1eacfa6413a2d3f445a9.name: Artifact Unresolved Connector Guidance
ca94bc3285c6b6a16e2f1eacfa6413a2d3f445a9.desc: Model-facing tool_result fragment telling the model how to set the `server` segment for an unresolved MCP connector when an artifact's MCP manifest is rejected.

421bbdf0ac3c32110155f3847d9ddf88c72be30f.name: Environment: GitHub Session Proxy Explainer
421bbdf0ac3c32110155f3847d9ddf88c72be30f.desc: Model-facing environment-info system-prompt fragment explaining that git/gh traffic is routed through a pre-configured session proxy and warning never to disable TLS verification or the proxy/sslCAInfo entries.

ecfb6faaf045d168f9547bd401d451b0aa35868d.name: Loop Stopped — No Further Wakeups
ecfb6faaf045d168f9547bd401d451b0aa35868d.desc: Model-facing tool_result telling the model the dynamic loop has stopped with no further wakeups scheduled, and to trigger any armed wakeup/timer it set.

f12c44559dc7decadee2e82181d4b201b539121e.name: Artifact Published
f12c44559dc7decadee2e82181d4b201b539121e.desc: Model-facing tool_result confirming an artifact was published, reporting its path and URL.

2ce414cb10cc25411f7eef2461c872befb3e4318.name: Tool Description: ScheduleWakeup Loop Dynamic
2ce414cb10cc25411f7eef2461c872befb3e4318.desc: Model-facing description of the ScheduleWakeup tool telling the model how to schedule resumption of work in /loop dynamic mode and when to stop the loop.

c6b98a85073ff902ba241c48887b9b6f4b3a6de8.name: ScheduleWakeup delaySeconds Parameter
c6b98a85073ff902ba241c48887b9b6f4b3a6de8.desc: Model-facing describe() for the delaySeconds input parameter on the ScheduleWakeup tool schema.

d60178047b6d1a59e1312e4de34f8231830879df.name: Loop Noop Flag Guidance
d60178047b6d1a59e1312e4de34f8231830879df.desc: Model-facing guidance block in the ScheduleWakeup tool prompt on when to set noop true/false and how consecutive quiet ticks fold into one context entry.

fd9801a2d261a30a66d30a8fe40486406f6c8a72.name: ScheduleWakeup stop Parameter
fd9801a2d261a30a66d30a8fe40486406f6c8a72.desc: Model-facing describe() for the stop boolean input parameter on the ScheduleWakeup tool schema.

ccc5451edb8c6dbe03f7512e16831b46075a177b.name: Artifact version Parameter
ccc5451edb8c6dbe03f7512e16831b46075a177b.desc: Model-facing describe() for the runtime version input parameter on the Artifact tool input schema.

02a454cb02e64de2d94beb9b1de69cec19bc52f8.name: Audio File Transcription Note
02a454cb02e64de2d94beb9b1de69cec19bc52f8.desc: Model-facing context note injected when the user @-mentions an audio file, telling the model the file was transcribed by Anthropic's speech-to-text and to treat the transcript as the spoken content.

9ac190a06fda1cda8b4a8d59668be7fde537dc9b.name: Code Review Diff-Size Finder Scaling
9ac190a06fda1cda8b4a8d59668be7fde537dc9b.desc: Model-facing code-review prompt fragment telling the review agent roughly how many finder subagents to spawn based on the diff line count.

e78d2dd355af50de3a744626d86f2f5d0fa888d5.name: Context Tip Feature Workflow Size Control
e78d2dd355af50de3a744626d86f2f5d0fa888d5.desc: Model-facing feature description in the context-tip watcher registry, injected into the tip-selector LLM prompt so it can suggest controlling workflow size.

79ddc2f0c64f2f675736287c82f723ab5e1525d6.name: Loop Wakeup Stopped Output Field
79ddc2f0c64f2f675736287c82f723ab5e1525d6.desc: Model-facing describe() on the loop/ScheduleWakeup outputSchema `stopped` field that the model reads in the tool result.

8cf9573b9b875a83f57ef14064058e9259aad4ec.name: System Reminder: Auto mode consent flow
8cf9573b9b875a83f57ef14064058e9259aad4ec.desc: Instructs Claude to continue with safe alternatives when auto mode blocks an action and batch any remaining consent asks

62668d191540cf578bf9a54e9e00913794dfd3b8.name: Tool Result: Bash exec-arg-limit worktree deny paths
62668d191540cf578bf9a54e9e00913794dfd3b8.desc: Bash spawn-failure (E2BIG) tail explaining the sandbox deny paths added per registered git worktree and how to prune them

7fc2a578234ac4174308897625cfa99d65e69465.name: Code Review Inline Prompt Envelope
7fc2a578234ac4174308897625cfa99d65e69465.desc: Model-facing outer template that assembles the inline code-review slash-command prompt returned to the model as a text content block

90c188d1dee351ba20fddb7c69cc05ea1ba8b2c3.name: Tool Parameter: Artifact favicon
90c188d1dee351ba20fddb7c69cc05ea1ba8b2c3.desc: Artifact tool favicon parameter — one or two emoji for the browser-tab icon

73d05c88a898a1f2a1750365d56cadd1e7a42f31.name: Tool Parameter: Artifact existing URL
73d05c88a898a1f2a1750365d56cadd1e7a42f31.desc: Artifact tool url parameter for updating an artifact this conversation did not publish

ca08d4ba8e79d88822b4da149d76609cf7460634.name: Tool Result: Permission denied escalate guidance
ca08d4ba8e79d88822b4da149d76609cf7460634.desc: Guidance appended to permission-denied results: stop and explain to the user when a blocked capability is essential

a3b30ec7d8d361b2596a3566cc417f476eca9861.name: Tool Parameter: Artifact list limit
a3b30ec7d8d361b2596a3566cc417f476eca9861.desc: Artifact tool limit parameter — max artifacts to return for action:list

5d671266a65c648c6ec08141f4d8b7401525260b.name: Tool Parameter: Artifact action
5d671266a65c648c6ec08141f4d8b7401525260b.desc: Artifact tool action parameter — publish (default) or list published artifacts

a8958db58fcac33bb02bcde47783cfbdb77f6974.name: Tool Parameter: Artifact file path
a8958db58fcac33bb02bcde47783cfbdb77f6974.desc: Artifact tool file_path parameter — path to the .html/.md file to render

25a9432052e5a63f16197595edf6c92eec6c98e4.name: Tool Parameter: EnterWorktree path
25a9432052e5a63f16197595edf6c92eec6c98e4.desc: EnterWorktree tool path parameter — existing worktree to switch into instead of creating one

608c32f34f8632a89e4f045a479659c8577804e4.name: Tool Result: Artifact published
608c32f34f8632a89e4f045a479659c8577804e4.desc: Tool result returned after publishing an artifact, with its path and URL

0bc626c2bbb27a99d8576681dd93dcf0fe6eac61.name: System Reminder: Skill scoped-variants guidance
0bc626c2bbb27a99d8576681dd93dcf0fe6eac61.desc: Appended when invoking an unscoped skill that has directory-scoped variants, nudging Claude to invoke the matching variant

b5147cd35103aa79423b6e050eb4ff1216c2c36e.name: Tool Result: Bash worktree isolation context lost
b5147cd35103aa79423b6e050eb4ff1216c2c36e.desc: Bash refusal when an agent's worktree isolation context was lost so the command would run in the parent directory

ad9b893666fc265c8c7178e3bd8289001a9a8c35.name: Tool Result: Bash worktree isolation escape blocked
ad9b893666fc265c8c7178e3bd8289001a9a8c35.desc: Bash refusal when a worktree-isolated agent's command resolved to the shared checkout instead of its worktree

73e2520df58ba5c84039f1cd899b8d5957907d82.name: Tool Result: ExitWorktree not owner
73e2520df58ba5c84039f1cd899b8d5957907d82.desc: ExitWorktree refusal to remove a worktree this session does not own

5f81a4ce8f41a78b483d1e66a4f5c52919e5484b.name: Tool Result: Unknown skill scoped variants
5f81a4ce8f41a78b483d1e66a4f5c52919e5484b.desc: Skill invocation error for an unknown bare name when directory-scoped variants exist

a81a160a71ac29788864b4b4666818636a303496.name: Data: Context tip situation — subagent fan-out
a81a160a71ac29788864b4b4666818636a303496.desc: Situation text for detecting when repeated independent subtasks should be fanned out to subagents

82b3105596e528eb3cb154450316da0b546b090e.name: Skill: /doctor slash command description
82b3105596e528eb3cb154450316da0b546b090e.desc: Trigger description for the /doctor slash command covering setup health, unused extensions, memory cleanup, hooks, updates, and permission prompts

4973f4a0e1e111a007c5f8e6be1bb3b6bf2112bc.name: Tool Result: MCP servers blocked by managed policy
4973f4a0e1e111a007c5f8e6be1bb3b6bf2112bc.desc: tool-result note telling the model the listed MCP servers are blocked by the org's managed policy (administrative block, retrying won't help)

df3dbb1afb3a9e0e7a9e6e61b317744751512fdc.name: Skill: Keybindings help — Validation section
df3dbb1afb3a9e0e7a9e6e61b317744751512fdc.desc: The '## Validation' section of the keybindings-help command prompt, injected into the model via getPromptForCommand

a91691b7c082f8c93c47ae1567862b563c001782.name: Tool Result: Conversation ended by model
a91691b7c082f8c93c47ae1567862b563c001782.desc: tool_use_error tool-result content injected when the model ends the conversation

ef7ff20efd8d667830e0aa2668d6da52d569c768.name: System Prompt: Commit/PR body length guidance
ef7ff20efd8d667830e0aa2668d6da52d569c768.desc: Guidance to keep the whole PR/commit body under 250 words covering what changed, why now, and how it was verified

3aecbc45aaf9d43e039f4901079db49d69197b50.name: System Reminder: MCP servers failed to connect
3aecbc45aaf9d43e039f4901079db49d69197b50.desc: Lists configured MCP servers that failed to connect and tells the agent to treat their tools as unavailable because of a connection failure

9743773967c34aae1a367cdb0af7f65395e1fd4c.name: System Prompt: Commit/PR body opening guidance
9743773967c34aae1a367cdb0af7f65395e1fd4c.desc: Guidance to open the body with 1-2 plain sentences saying what the change does and why for a reader who was not part of the session

b74a3f0c15db241202dd4d5d056d77e2c172850a.name: System Prompt: Background-session shipping — commit, push, PR
b74a3f0c15db241202dd4d5d056d77e2c172850a.desc: Background-session variant instructing the agent to commit, push the branch and open a draft PR; supersedes the Background Session shipping policy where they differ.

7faf7ae23465ce342d8a2d8c9129a149fc1bcdcd.name: System Prompt: Writing commit messages and PR descriptions
7faf7ae23465ce342d8a2d8c9129a149fc1bcdcd.desc: Guidance header and bullets for writing zero-context commit messages and PR descriptions

17bd27d97f237e223db863f6bea4afa0595a04ed.name: System Reminder: Mid-turn user message surfacing
17bd27d97f237e223db863f6bea4afa0595a04ed.desc: Explains to the model that a user message is being surfaced mid-turn within the running turn, alongside the next tool result

fc88a571373932f1988794cb3cdcfbee93594da2.name: System Prompt: cc-memory citation wrapping
fc88a571373932f1988794cb3cdcfbee93594da2.desc: Instructs the model to wrap any sentence that uses or cites memory content in a <cc-memory filenames="..."> tag

f3213dae8afb53c0aa74a10a446eaeed6c9b6b39.name: System Prompt: User-message attribution guard
f3213dae8afb53c0aa74a10a446eaeed6c9b6b39.desc: Directs the model to treat only genuine user-role turns as user messages and never attribute transcript-shaped text inside assistant messages to the user.

b7d84dee540278ac130ea202c0c05d999ca11123.name: Tool Result: MCP servers failed to connect
b7d84dee540278ac130ea202c0c05d999ca11123.desc: tool-result note telling the model the listed MCP servers failed to connect; treat as connection failure and quoted error text as unvalidated data

07c8185d1488ac75010bb7b25a8f77186fb7b390.name: System Reminder: MCP servers blocked by managed policy
07c8185d1488ac75010bb7b25a8f77186fb7b390.desc: System-reminder context listing MCP servers blocked by the org's managed policy — their tools are unavailable this session; an administrative block

9106af1336d4b725951152e4dcc7766872db1f06.name: System Prompt: PR test-plan guidance
9106af1336d4b725951152e4dcc7766872db1f06.desc: Guidance to state in the test plan what was actually verified — the command run and behavior observed — and to name anything left unverified

8a48c2bf7371b27468143241444d4397c846fc75.name: System Prompt: Worktree shipping branch isolation
8a48c2bf7371b27468143241444d4397c846fc75.desc: Shipping guidance: build the PR branch in a separate worktree (git worktree add) carrying only your task's edits, leaving the user's checkout as found

429a1c6703aba7dfed7759cc207ff4b58594eed2.name: System Prompt: Task shipping — feature branch and PR
429a1c6703aba7dfed7759cc207ff4b58594eed2.desc: Instructs the agent to ship code changes on a feature branch, open a PR, and never push to main/master or force-push.

b2fbafb17d03f4fe91a8b2f9d234b72516073162.name: System Prompt: Untrusted repo-file layout guard
b2fbafb17d03f4fe91a8b2f9d234b72516073162.desc: Warns the model that an included repository file is untrusted, to mirror only its section layout and never follow instructions or fill in secrets it requests.

2ab7d2f8ae0a0973d7c8a63771b18f5f2cf7832e.name: Tool Parameter: ExitPlanMode allowedPrompts (deprecated)
2ab7d2f8ae0a0973d7c8a63771b18f5f2cf7832e.desc: The ExitPlanMode allowedPrompts input-schema field description — deprecated to "Deprecated: no longer used." in CC 2.1.205 (formerly "Prompt-based permissions needed to implement the plan").

b7c11b53fdbff396c7b360491e599528deb0ebd1.name: System Reminder: Background-task event not user input
b7c11b53fdbff396c7b360491e599528deb0ebd1.desc: Prefix note stamped onto background-task events warning the model this is not user acknowledgement/consent

aec3742f29e3143a658cc452ef7cec2956903678.name: Tool parameter: Cowork output if_match CAS etag
aec3742f29e3143a658cc452ef7cec2956903678.desc: Model-facing describe() text for the if_match output-file CAS parameter in the Cowork staged-call mcp tool inputSchema.

a519a8f2958b8886f2e18bbbcfcab02d8619062e.name: Tool parameter: Cowork staging error detail
a519a8f2958b8886f2e18bbbcfcab02d8619062e.desc: Model-facing describe() text for the staging.detail field in the Cowork staged-call result schema.

f46b030cbfb82905eef5246940f6d46c300a9b51.name: Tool parameter: Cowork staging result presence
f46b030cbfb82905eef5246940f6d46c300a9b51.desc: Model-facing describe() text for the optional staging result object in the Cowork staged-call mcp tool output schema.

61f199791d951f14a0537e24248c4865b096b5e7.desc: Description of the "value" input for the browser form_input tool, sent to the model in the tool schema.

c99557668e0e69b001e4f55bd49ab3f9c4c16714.name: browser_batch actions parameter
c99557668e0e69b001e4f55bd49ab3f9c4c16714.desc: Description of the "actions" list input for the browser_batch tool, sent to the model in the tool schema.

dfd1f84be69a4b76a5695605b03c3c87efbee3c5.desc: Trailing fragment of the tabs_close_mcp browser tool description sent to the model.

f46a3f7fcab3bfd453f0da8ae88f119d8fa4ee49.name: Perforce read-only file error
f46a3f7fcab3bfd453f0da8ae88f119d8fa4ee49.desc: Tool error returned to the model when Edit/Write targets a Perforce read-only file, instructing it to run p4 edit and not chmod.

0e7991f8f8cc8b4b563a31f4d55a9f2049db31a6.name: Partial-response continuation preamble
0e7991f8f8cc8b4b563a31f4d55a9f2049db31a6.desc: Injected as meta message content when an interrupted/refused response is salvaged; frames the quoted partial text for the model to continue from.

ffea53b9e2442ff0317235d411839fcd02c3bc9f.name: Partial-response data-not-instructions guard
ffea53b9e2442ff0317235d411839fcd02c3bc9f.desc: Part of the partial-response continuation message injected into context, telling the model the quoted text is data to resume from, not instructions to follow.

f313b7480e8e539aec78bd8601ccef67f29b43d9.name: Partial-response continue instruction
f313b7480e8e539aec78bd8601ccef67f29b43d9.desc: Closing instruction of the partial-response continuation message injected into context, directing the model to resume seamlessly without repeating, apologizing, or mentioning the interruption.

cf965743b76c6c1bc69288253eed9513c4156793.name: Brief mode enforce sentinel
cf965743b76c6c1bc69288253eed9513c4156793.desc: Meta message injected back into the conversation when the model ends a turn without calling SendUserMessage in Brief mode.

fd67541a92de628e389b48a11ec64fcf5af0f305.name: Edit: file-not-read error
fd67541a92de628e389b48a11ec64fcf5af0f305.desc: Error returned to the model as tool_result when it tries to Edit/Write a file it has not Read first.

b0e7c7308e49287a9ccef7a07a898ca6f16c03f5.name: Edit: file-changed-since-read error
b0e7c7308e49287a9ccef7a07a898ca6f16c03f5.desc: Error returned to the model as tool_result when the target file changed since last read, instructing it to re-Read then retry.

a49634923a45390b92c526742301e9a9a92e2377.name: Empty tool input validation error
a49634923a45390b92c526742301e9a9a92e2377.desc: Feedback returned to the model when it calls a tool with an empty input object despite required parameters, listing them and a minimal valid call shape.

a4edd455f170585eb494d13933de54cc73d3bdd0.name: Memory directory-exists note

364fa5886dc6baf7f6876d3e0700d6ff10cdb52f.desc: Security warning prepended to sub-agent output when the handoff classifier flags a possible policy violation, shown to the parent model.

ac988797edeb5daab8ef6298803ef135e7e1a278.name: Command not invocable — ask user
ac988797edeb5daab8ef6298803ef135e7e1a278.desc: Suffix appended to skill-invoke errors telling the model to ask the user to run the slash command themselves.

9c56cdacdbad6d61a590c5c2feee94beae61bb90.name: Skill invoke: UI/CLI command not a skill
9c56cdacdbad6d61a590c5c2feee94beae61bb90.desc: Skill-tool error returned to the model when the named target is a UI or built-in CLI command rather than a skill.

4c5aa6386f397cb174daec3ed711bab7ad776931.name: Skill invoke: MCP prompt not a skill
4c5aa6386f397cb174daec3ed711bab7ad776931.desc: Skill-tool error returned to the model when the named target is an MCP prompt rather than a skill.

ce18160471c2b3a05e505de23f3869371d2af545.name: Artifact too-large mermaid renderer note
ce18160471c2b3a05e505de23f3869371d2af545.desc: Suffix in the Artifact publish too-large error noting the inline mermaid renderer was appended, returned to the model.

b867b680f845605711ffba8527b19033f9c018a0.name: SendFile source unreadable/too large
b867b680f845605711ffba8527b19033f9c018a0.desc: Per-file error shown in the SendFile tool result when a source cannot be read or exceeds the transfer size limit.

563770432074512a33d859e3acfb304b4194f17a.name: PreToolUse hook timeout stop
563770432074512a33d859e3acfb304b4194f17a.desc: Stop reason returned to the model when a PreToolUse hook does not respond before its timeout and the tool call is skipped.

7359be4938a7e6aadff829f7f2074d0d7c1c52c2.name: EnterWorktree reset-to-base note
7359be4938a7e6aadff829f7f2074d0d7c1c52c2.desc: Note in the EnterWorktree tool result that an existing fully-merged worktree was reset to the current base.

847750022e809983873f3ba2be99481889c04b6d.name: EnterWorktree now-working message
847750022e809983873f3ba2be99481889c04b6d.desc: Main EnterWorktree tool result telling the model the session is now working in the worktree, with ExitWorktree guidance.

e0643357ed548b36a2ce7fc494c4c67c655624f2.name: SendFile not-delivered placeholder
e0643357ed548b36a2ce7fc494c4c67c655624f2.desc: Inline placeholder shown in message content when a sent file could not be delivered to the recipient.

da3c89818665350b2938ce02e03924da78cf5253.name: Send target: DID peers text-only
da3c89818665350b2938ce02e03924da78cf5253.desc: Refused-target SendFile result when the recipient is a DID peer, which accepts text only.

39da6bbd7183612e27e36e3300e6ad620c67cc3c.name: Send target ambiguous — multiple peers
39da6bbd7183612e27e36e3300e6ad620c67cc3c.desc: Refused-target SendFile result when a recipient name matches multiple peer sessions, asking the model to re-send with a specific ref.

38e2a325f2a83b13be748ce4ce8aebcc12af39f6.name: Send target matches only in-session agents
38e2a325f2a83b13be748ce4ce8aebcc12af39f6.desc: Refused-target SendFile result when a recipient matches only in-session agents, steering to reference the file as @<path>.

10d2247807e0df6f78bc8d9d9c07c9589043eee2.name: Send target: see available sessions hint
10d2247807e0df6f78bc8d9d9c07c9589043eee2.desc: Hint in the refused not-found SendFile result pointing the model to the tool that lists sessions it can send files to.

f4cbe54d9c411bd791140e3ba47ab0f9f91ecb7a.name: Send target: cloud list unavailable
f4cbe54d9c411bd791140e3ba47ab0f9f91ecb7a.desc: Note appended to a refused SendFile target result that the cloud session list could not be fetched, so cloud sessions were not searched.

b04a8db31fe57039c783a6c67f07ce1c898ddfe9.name: SendFile file-read disabled (deny)
b04a8db31fe57039c783a6c67f07ce1c898ddfe9.desc: Permission-deny message returned to the model when SendFile file-content reading is disabled by rule.

031be042e86662f3ce1de2457b44bc3193e8c382.name: SendFile autofs -hosts path unsupported
031be042e86662f3ce1de2457b44bc3193e8c382.desc: SendFile validateInput error returned to the model when an attachment path is a /net autofs -hosts path.

d541ead381582c005c830a57907352dd12244fda.name: SendFile files-not-sent header
d541ead381582c005c830a57907352dd12244fda.desc: Header line in the SendFile tool result introducing the list of files that could not be sent.

f173167793a56155c9e33c636b7c4cd026e46dd7.name: SendFile path resolves to unreadable location
f173167793a56155c9e33c636b7c4cd026e46dd7.desc: Per-file SendFile error that a path resolves to a location not readable under the sessions permissions.

e64ab0c40b671d015e7ffa4accc27c1742ad6beb.name: SendFile: no files staged
e64ab0c40b671d015e7ffa4accc27c1742ad6beb.desc: SendFile tool result when no files could be staged for transfer to the recipient.

44d51f5dcd65e8188c78141a2d7e523b17730287.name: SendFile peer restarted, stale socket
44d51f5dcd65e8188c78141a2d7e523b17730287.desc: Suffix appended to a SendFile failure telling the model the peer likely restarted and the socket path is stale.

b395f4c0082fda71cc49ca07aede93bb62fdb1e2.name: SendFile peer pipe busy
b395f4c0082fda71cc49ca07aede93bb62fdb1e2.desc: Suffix appended to a SendFile failure telling the model the peer pipe is momentarily busy and to retry.

2d69142881e613820cd77756991e1bbbb6f86549.name: SendFile failed-to-send (socket)
2d69142881e613820cd77756991e1bbbb6f86549.desc: SendFile tool result reporting a send failure to a labeled recipient over the local socket, with an error detail suffix.

b600aa59ee778f2e19288b15fa10167326ef574b.name: SendFile isolatePeerMachines needs approval
b600aa59ee778f2e19288b15fa10167326ef574b.desc: SendFile tool result when isolatePeerMachines requires approval and nothing was sent.

54d747a3e063b0ef40fc0e61958c24ecbb8ad19d.name: SendFile permission narrowed input
54d747a3e063b0ef40fc0e61958c24ecbb8ad19d.desc: SendFile tool result when the permission handler narrowed the input to a shape SendFile cannot accept, so nothing was sent.

79a67e577ebcb5075c67f599e81b4c371a2693bc.name: SendFile: no files uploaded
79a67e577ebcb5075c67f599e81b4c371a2693bc.desc: SendFile tool result when no files could be uploaded for transfer to the recipient over the bridge.

a09517bd46bc25902de87138fa255fb5408e40e2.name: SendFile bridge ID stale
a09517bd46bc25902de87138fa255fb5408e40e2.desc: Suffix appended to a bridge SendFile failure telling the model the peer session ended/restarted and the bridge ID is stale.

73712fe3093f42bbbd7709fbf7c21820fb3bc702.name: SendFile failed-to-send (bridge)
73712fe3093f42bbbd7709fbf7c21820fb3bc702.desc: SendFile tool result reporting a send failure over the bridge transport, with an error detail suffix.

040007042cb41b5ca4bfee3f90b3128e736eaa55.name: Artifact list description (mine)
040007042cb41b5ca4bfee3f90b3128e736eaa55.desc: Dynamic Artifact tool description shown to the model for the list action scoped to the users own published artifacts.

90d523b6440e3f6fc59f1df48bafa0dd5afb02a9.name: Artifact list description (shared)
90d523b6440e3f6fc59f1df48bafa0dd5afb02a9.desc: Dynamic Artifact tool description shown to the model for the list action scoped to artifacts others shared.

a5d17f70824bf4f5d69c578264d1249bab5ced09.name: Artifact list description (all)
a5d17f70824bf4f5d69c578264d1249bab5ced09.desc: Dynamic Artifact tool description shown to the model for the list action covering both published and shared artifacts.

ba6bc971cf399ee15f14e4140b8eb1ac11206a60.name: Artifact list extra-params error
ba6bc971cf399ee15f14e4140b8eb1ac11206a60.desc: Artifact validateInput error telling the model the list action takes only limit and scope, listing the extra keys to remove.

ee65e612fba721bec232ace5b8580ff010dcd291.name: Artifact no-inline-content steer
ee65e612fba721bec232ace5b8580ff010dcd291.desc: Validation steer returned to the model that the Artifact tool reads from a file on disk and does not take inline content.

f93e779976ab52578edb586ffae15a46001ef1f0.name: Artifact write-file-first steer
f93e779976ab52578edb586ffae15a46001ef1f0.desc: Validation steer instructing the model to write the page to a file first, then call Artifact with file_path.

9255d182e9ce91acf40e3a483b70251695e6cffc.name: Artifact list empty-not-proof caveat
9255d182e9ce91acf40e3a483b70251695e6cffc.desc: Caveat appended to the Artifact list result that an empty listing does not prove nothing was shared org-wide.

f622b6884e87f1c63ac5cc65ee5ef415be07bd40.name: Artifact listing empty-window note
f622b6884e87f1c63ac5cc65ee5ef415be07bd40.desc: Branch of the ArtifactTool listing tool_result shown when the truncated window is empty; injected as tool-result content to the model.

c8e4e9dee2d34e78490c4a3b94998c33783f385c.name: Artifact listing count header
c8e4e9dee2d34e78490c4a3b94998c33783f385c.desc: Count/scope header line of the ArtifactTool listing tool_result (e.g. "N artifacts shared with you (most recent first):"), returned to the model.

4098a0f98c47b742c6aecb998779b4dcbca5213b.name: MCP server credential-rejected error
4098a0f98c47b742c6aecb998779b4dcbca5213b.desc: Failed-server .error text (HTTP 401 session credential rejected) quoted into the model-facing "MCP servers failed to connect" system-reminder via DZn.

d4720d9e96b72bf918f8f86520d35cfc3bc76697.name: Permission judge stage-1 harm-grading instruction
d4720d9e96b72bf918f8f86520d35cfc3bc76697.desc: Prompt fragment (Xoy) spliced into the auto-mode/permission severity-classifier prompt: stage 1 grades HARM only and emits <severity>N</severity>.

8452d82321cba6a768d7302ef3fd87c131f4e893.name: Permission judge classification-review reminder
8452d82321cba6a768d7302ef3fd87c131f4e893.desc: Prompt fragment (Qoy) reminding the severity classifier that explicit user confirmation is required to override blocks; part of the auto-mode classifier prompt.

1e0d9549d75bcc556b0482c4722db6f19fff3123.name: Permission judge severity-scale output instruction
1e0d9549d75bcc556b0482c4722db6f19fff3123.desc: Prompt fragment (Zoy) defining the 0-100 <severity> output scale with 50 as the allow/block boundary; part of the auto-mode severity-classifier prompt.

f85eea1be1d01a2eff00ab14802cc09780659ee5.name: Recon: visibility not queryable (traffic disabled)
f85eea1be1d01a2eff00ab14802cc09780659ee5.desc: Repo-visibility placeholder in the auto-mode pre-gathered recon document (nonessential traffic disabled/policy-restricted), sent as the recon user message to the proposer model.

3c9c93677de02d32018184f647ddc00cad946177.name: Recon: visibility not queryable (org/repo not derivable)
3c9c93677de02d32018184f647ddc00cad946177.desc: Repo-visibility placeholder in the auto-mode recon document when org/repo cannot be derived from the origin remote; part of the model-facing recon context.

855b5af1fdf2c17653e1a8632a62294e946f4660.name: Recon: visibility not queryable (non-github host)
855b5af1fdf2c17653e1a8632a62294e946f4660.desc: Repo-visibility placeholder in the auto-mode recon document when the origin remote is not github.com; part of the model-facing recon context.

63abff77d5ba05aec660c7900c8b12eb817160f5.name: Recon: visibility redacted-count note
63abff77d5ba05aec660c7900c8b12eb817160f5.desc: Note in the auto-mode recon visibility section for names outside the display charset/visibility enum being redacted; part of the model-facing recon context.

fcb424f017900511397553bec0b3d9507375b988.name: Recon: infer-visibility fallback guidance
fcb424f017900511397553bec0b3d9507375b988.desc: Fallback text (Xds) embedded in the "not queryable here" recon visibility placeholders, telling the classifier to infer visibility from the remote hostname or ask.

0a3ae8a89d050310c3ed446408932d98afab956d.name: Recon: other-project transcripts not mined note
0a3ae8a89d050310c3ed446408932d98afab956d.desc: Note in the auto-mode recon that other projects’ transcripts are not mined (a Q2 opt-in); part of the model-facing recon context.

9cdaec8648422a9f234c8dc2faebd620958ef161.name: Recon: home is a network path, not walked
9cdaec8648422a9f234c8dc2faebd620958ef161.desc: Repo-walk placeholder in the auto-mode recon when the home dir resolves to a network path so it is not walked; part of the model-facing recon context.

0f2fd2a61f42a116df41a8ca18a9c1147b79b3a8.name: Recon: home unreadable, not walked
0f2fd2a61f42a116df41a8ca18a9c1147b79b3a8.desc: Repo-walk placeholder in the auto-mode recon when the home dir could not be read; part of the model-facing recon context.

7be01aa8f0aa025d2f6838a04fbbf895fd1fe2a0.name: Recon: gitdir outside home note
7be01aa8f0aa025d2f6838a04fbbf895fd1fe2a0.desc: Per-repo note in the auto-mode recon repos list when the gitdir points outside the home directory so remotes were not read.

d65de415221dcbae9eb7cecb88bc1422009997ad.name: Recon: remote on unknown VCS host note
d65de415221dcbae9eb7cecb88bc1422009997ad.desc: Per-repo note in the auto-mode recon repos list when the remote is not on a known VCS host so it is not shown.

44a62658c494fd8fcf7ef52252164b144378915a.name: Recon: repos-found list header
44a62658c494fd8fcf7ef52252164b144378915a.desc: Header for the "Other git repos under the home directory" recon section listing repo paths and stripped host/org/repo remotes; part of the model-facing recon context.

7aa442c41caeb74fd9a3bff10347ce7a729044f3.name: Recon: no repos found before walk cut short
7aa442c41caeb74fd9a3bff10347ce7a729044f3.desc: Recon repos-section placeholder when the walk was cut short before finding repos; instructs treating as unknown not none.

5d4f049d2414bee1e2e285b19dec23c0810aa215.name: Recon: repos are candidates, not vetted
5d4f049d2414bee1e2e285b19dec23c0810aa215.desc: Note in the auto-mode recon repos section that listed repos are candidates to keep only if the org appears in Repo facts/sibling-docs.

939ebf151e5aca7040d65b731153729a6c4a1755.name: Recon: transcripts not gathered (no permission context)
939ebf151e5aca7040d65b731153729a6c4a1755.desc: Placeholder in the auto-mode recon recent-usage section when no permission context was available to enforce permissions.deny.

9fde963f01331e13cbd44837fe92ab09a4637540.name: Recon: projects root not queryable
9fde963f01331e13cbd44837fe92ab09a4637540.desc: Placeholder in the auto-mode recon recent-usage section when the projects root is absent/unreadable or enumeration timed out.

d678a5a76e66be435d9a8f649e37d2dd82b82383.name: Recon: transcripts-scanned summary line
d678a5a76e66be435d9a8f649e37d2dd82b82383.desc: Summary line in the auto-mode recon recent-usage section reporting transcripts scanned/selected/enumerated and Bash commands seen.

3055ff8b3e9c3f89c1a3de57d68091531cf2929e.name: Recon: enumeration cap reached note
3055ff8b3e9c3f89c1a3de57d68091531cf2929e.desc: Note in the auto-mode recon recent-usage section that the enumeration cap was hit so recent sessions past the cap may be missing.

c4fd35f5632865b47e0542402c73bc58ab3c88e1.name: Recon: transcripts/projects not enumerated note
c4fd35f5632865b47e0542402c73bc58ab3c88e1.desc: Note in the auto-mode recon recent-usage section that some transcripts/project dirs could not be enumerated so coverage is partial.

a9cd93cc1f7197a65a608e0269faaaccafb4b814.name: Recon: transcripts skipped by read-deny gate
a9cd93cc1f7197a65a608e0269faaaccafb4b814.desc: Note in the auto-mode recon recent-usage section that some transcripts were not read due to permissions.deny / untrusted / out-of-scope paths.

e3270ff96bc31d540550a266d785c3a2b16f5d34.name: Recon: transcripts unreadable note
e3270ff96bc31d540550a266d785c3a2b16f5d34.desc: Note in the auto-mode recon recent-usage section that some transcripts could not be read (removed mid-gather or symlink/hardlink alias).

6c313feb7f67fb0660ab37e17045bcce624c7020.name: Recon: tools-in-other-projects Q2 note
6c313feb7f67fb0660ab37e17045bcce624c7020.desc: Note under the recon "Tools run in other projects" list clarifying the Q2 opt-in and that only command words (not raw command lines) were read.

ec6ae137cf91f820558ab123af3a6bb211f1e68c.name: Recon: walk hit time budget (incomplete)
ec6ae137cf91f820558ab123af3a6bb211f1e68c.desc: Trailing note in the auto-mode recon repos section that the walk hit its time budget so the list is incomplete.

31d60a9d1248bf0ea23e0a35bf317036dc7dbc65.name: Recon: walk hit directory budget (incomplete)
31d60a9d1248bf0ea23e0a35bf317036dc7dbc65.desc: Trailing note in the auto-mode recon repos section that the walk hit its directory budget so the list is incomplete.

a8c6735628e99fbf18914a8741284fbf97eb9fa1.name: Recon: walk hit repo cap
a8c6735628e99fbf18914a8741284fbf97eb9fa1.desc: Trailing note in the auto-mode recon repos section that the walk stopped at the repo cap so more may exist.

e731cf0f370770528a444acc34f16d3f5d98ee26.name: Recon: classifier-bypassing allow entries header
e731cf0f370770528a444acc34f16d3f5d98ee26.desc: Section header (ops) in the auto-mode recon "Existing auto-mode settings" block listing permissions.allow entries auto mode ignores; part of the model-facing recon context.

1ad0957ae7ebfb7633a2f95b4712454d9f5afb90.name: Recon: destructive allow entries header
1ad0957ae7ebfb7633a2f95b4712454d9f5afb90.desc: Section header (ips) in the auto-mode recon "Existing auto-mode settings" block listing destructive permissions.allow entries honored at runtime; part of the model-facing recon context.

3f08ba04b7b56588479f675cd82ab6521fb8fa7f.name: /auto-mode-setup usage text
3f08ba04b7b56588479f675cd82ab6521fb8fa7f.desc: Usage string returned as JSON reason by the non-interactive /auto-mode-setup local command; surfaced to the model via local-command-stdout.

65abc17d9d6d36e3e92bb4a1cf731296ade6eb13.name: auto-mode-setup bad-path reason
65abc17d9d6d36e3e92bb4a1cf731296ade6eb13.desc: bad_path error reason returned by /auto-mode-setup --apply-file when the proposal path isn't under an allowed dir; model-visible command result.

9f581e0228aa9c82a2502940d6def57d7cbbb56e.name: auto-mode-setup read-denied reason
9f581e0228aa9c82a2502940d6def57d7cbbb56e.desc: read_denied error reason when the proposal path is covered by a permissions.deny read rule; returned as /auto-mode-setup command result.

72eb36efc4b705939508a38031c5273707a54492.name: auto-mode-setup read-failed reason
72eb36efc4b705939508a38031c5273707a54492.desc: read_failed error reason when the proposal file can't be read; returned as /auto-mode-setup command result.

4dd388c6e96605839f5a63c6850ca555a0c454fa.name: auto-mode-setup too-large reason
4dd388c6e96605839f5a63c6850ca555a0c454fa.desc: too_large error reason when the proposal file exceeds the 1 MB cap; returned as /auto-mode-setup command result.

2bc8d9e8bb5bdc9bd233e84ca0bb406c77a756d8.name: MCP reconnect: none configured
2bc8d9e8bb5bdc9bd233e84ca0bb406c77a756d8.desc: /mcp reconnect result reported when the requested servers aren't configured yet; returned as model-visible local-command-stdout.

85acad015a91612b729ef0007fc9021c63c91511.name: Usage nudge: /doctor checkup feature
85acad015a91612b729ef0007fc9021c63c91511.desc: Feature blurb for the 'doctor-checkup' usage-nudge entry, injected into the context-tip/usage-nudge selector prompt the model reads to decide which tip to surface.

f2dbd998901048efc45225192c5353677703e929.name: SendUserFile download-failed reason (not signed in)
f2dbd998901048efc45225192c5353677703e929.desc: Reason fragment embedded in the model-facing '[SendFile: "X" was not delivered — …]' tool result when a file couldn't be downloaded because the user isn't signed in.

dcfca217c6f0ce1e32d927fb15979b8bfe114f66.name: Artifact MCP call-contract guidance
dcfca217c6f0ce1e32d927fb15979b8bfe114f66.desc: Guidance injected into the artifact runtime-capabilities skill body telling the model where the window.claude.mcp type definitions (.d.ts) are extracted and to read them before writing any window.claude.mcp call.

86925a7d998ac70ad81f1e6bd11618e87756fdda.name: Artifact capability guidance unfetched
86925a7d998ac70ad81f1e6bd11618e87756fdda.desc: Artifact-capability guidance fragment stating a capability's authoring guidance couldn't be fetched but its type definitions were extracted, telling the model to read that file before declaring the capability.

74ccab3cf3384e4b494c0f2291b95df0b4153561.name: Artifact capability fully unfetched
74ccab3cf3384e4b494c0f2291b95df0b4153561.desc: Artifact-capability guidance fragment stating both authoring guidance and type definitions couldn't be fetched this invocation and that re-invoking the skill retries.

e780569749e4572bdf31681e34e1e18e7b6f581b.name: Artifact capability roster unfetched
e780569749e4572bdf31681e34e1e18e7b6f581b.desc: Artifact runtime-capabilities guidance note appended when the contract's capability roster couldn't be fetched, telling the model the contract service may be unreachable and re-invoking retries.

9d13c4e26f261e2688c5ab250ba997e14b0b112d.name: Artifact guidance pinned-to-contract note
9d13c4e26f261e2688c5ab250ba997e14b0b112d.desc: Artifact runtime-capabilities guidance note injected to tell the model this guidance is pinned to the runtime-contract version the target currently runs.

6c53055a91a9e8fa9d33b7ab52069ddc204a68a6.name: Artifact type-definitions extracted note
6c53055a91a9e8fa9d33b7ab52069ddc204a68a6.desc: Artifact-capability guidance fragment listing the extracted .d.ts type-definition files and telling the model to read each before declaring that capability.

e0759129da78192e3b9bb64f0b6e25c8c282ffb6.name: Schedule note: GitHub access unverified
e0759129da78192e3b9bb64f0b6e25c8c282ffb6.desc: Environment/context note injected into the /schedule (routine) prompt when GitHub access for a repo couldn't be verified temporarily, suggesting installing the Claude GitHub App.

6fe1dd627067ec508efc97056e9c7c913cf5696d.name: Orphaned agents aggregate — stopped
6fe1dd627067ec508efc97056e9c7c913cf5696d.desc: Aggregate system-reminder listing background agents from a previous session with no completion record (stopped variant), injected as a task-notification into the model context.

04ecb7eaa2b86be7ed7f5db901e46c0db23c2030.name: Orphaned agents aggregate — lost
04ecb7eaa2b86be7ed7f5db901e46c0db23c2030.desc: Aggregate system-reminder listing background agents that were running when the previous Claude Code process exited and lost in-process state, injected as a task-notification into the model context.

a4c405c4143c0ae1b4d7bab41b3efe7dbe7aaace.name: Orphaned tasks aggregate notification wrapper
a4c405c4143c0ae1b4d7bab41b3efe7dbe7aaace.desc: Generic system-reminder wrapper announcing that N background agent/shell task(s) from the previous session have no completion record and were marked stopped/failed, injected as a task-notification into the model context.

f99b5475c1ef301dd04b495283bc4c9b8f1a59e8.name: Memory Sync: Org Writes Enabled Notice
f99b5475c1ef301dd04b495283bc4c9b8f1a59e8.desc: Notice returned by the memory-write sync check telling the model that org-memory writes are enabled for this directory so the file syncs to the org-wide shared store; injected after Edit/Write via the PostToolUse hook's additionalContext.

20d5d7be75d0091dcd492eba0943accfff34ab2f.name: Tool Description: Bash Working Directory Persists (No cd Prompt Variant)
20d5d7be75d0091dcd492eba0943accfff34ab2f.desc: Bash tool description bullet stating that the working directory persists between calls while shell state does not; the branch selected when the cd-permission-prompt caveat does not apply, concatenated into the Bash tool's description the model reads.

0a450bffcef7f9cce911fc66acac2c2e3375d9e2.name: Tool Result: MCP Refresh Discovery Unauthorized
0a450bffcef7f9cce911fc66acac2c2e3375d9e2.desc: Error string returned when an MCP server rejects tool discovery as unauthorized, telling the model the user must authorize the connector via /mcp; surfaced in the refresh-MCP-tools tool result.

79fe2938fe61761ad90c6574335f7e700428f883.name: Tool Description: Refresh MCP Tools Search Hint
79fe2938fe61761ad90c6574335f7e700428f883.desc: searchHint one-liner for the refresh-MCP-tools tool, rendered into the subagent worker tool roster the model reads.

3107ffa3ae64e56a7c866c38ae7fc8b33febff3c.name: Tool Result: MCP Refresh tools/list Failed, Previous Set Kept
3107ffa3ae64e56a7c866c38ae7fc8b33febff3c.desc: Default error string when an MCP server's tools/list call fails and the previous tool set is retained; returned in the refresh-MCP-tools tool result.

27f216f78f56f2ff41e5874acc3a478a3be419ca.name: Tool Result: MCP Refresh Pool Not Updated
27f216f78f56f2ff41e5874acc3a478a3be419ca.desc: Error string explaining that the server refreshed but the live tool pool was not updated (server removed/disconnected mid-refresh or tools unmanaged in this session mode); returned in the refresh-MCP-tools tool result.

3a0bcd8782892e4f98422032b7b0bd0b3482cf4b.name: System Prompt: Background subagent delegation examples
3a0bcd8782892e4f98422032b7b0bd0b3482cf4b.desc: Worked <example> block showing background subagent delegation, the waiting-state reply, and later result reporting; concatenated into the Task/agent tool description string returned by its async description()/prompt() builder.

43fdad90b07686a17156d30bf4fa3860fcd1821f.name: Tool Result: Screenshot saved — include paths
43fdad90b07686a17156d30bf4fa3860fcd1821f.desc: Note appended to an MCP screenshot tool result telling the model to include the saved screenshot path(s) in its response so they can be attached for the user.

ab2b6f2f5fd077402c6ac35da37ba518126e1851.name: Tool Description: Navigate
ab2b6f2f5fd077402c6ac35da37ba518126e1851.desc: Describes the browser navigate tool for opening URLs and moving forward or backward in tab history, including tabId rules standalone vs inside browser_batch; emitted as the tool-definition `description` field.

e8395d450324fe80dfd3fdd94a26df51a8f84e74.name: Tool Result: No MCP Servers To Refresh
e8395d450324fe80dfd3fdd94a26df51a8f84e74.desc: Tool-result content returned to the model by refreshMcpTools when no MCP servers were available to refresh.

3b44302cb63789e25714a2d913417bef035864a7.name: Tool Result: Screenshot Save Directory Could Not Be Created
3b44302cb63789e25714a2d913417bef035864a7.desc: Note appended to an MCP screenshot tool result when save_to_disk failed because the screenshot directory could not be created; tells the model the image is inline above.

1015206dc349daef567a116eaaf960c0d2e9349e.name: Tool Result: Screenshot Write To Disk Failed
1015206dc349daef567a116eaaf960c0d2e9349e.desc: Note appended to an MCP screenshot tool result when at least one screenshot could not be written to disk; tells the model the image is included inline above.

7b3b1cec96c9c355b4d500cc584d7abd3720b931.name: Tool Result: Screenshot save_to_disk Had No Effect
7b3b1cec96c9c355b4d500cc584d7abd3720b931.desc: Note appended to an MCP screenshot tool result when screenshots are not persisted to disk this session, instructing the model to use the inline image and not retry save_to_disk.

10fc26d9a3ab9e7d922306bd096e86689bde0443.name: Tool Parameter: refreshMcpTools server
10fc26d9a3ab9e7d922306bd096e86689bde0443.desc: Description of the optional `server` parameter of the refreshMcpTools tool, emitted in the tool's inputSchema that the model reads.

8b38248eebee38a4e590c21e1dd5aca86cc0208a.name: Tool Result: Screenshot save_to_disk Directory Failed
8b38248eebee38a4e590c21e1dd5aca86cc0208a.desc: Note appended to a screenshot MCP tool result telling the model save_to_disk failed because the screenshot directory could not be created and the image is inline instead.

e24ecd55e612f69f89b15cb29c5f2ee68af6d338.name: Tool Result: Screenshot save_to_disk No Effect
e24ecd55e612f69f89b15cb29c5f2ee68af6d338.desc: Note appended to a screenshot MCP tool result telling the model screenshots are not persisted this session, to refer to the inline image, and not to retry save_to_disk.

a433453a42578aee5237c91a822d2743fb2ea37b.name: Tool Result: Screenshot save_to_disk Write Failed
a433453a42578aee5237c91a822d2743fb2ea37b.desc: Note appended to a screenshot MCP tool result telling the model at least one screenshot could not be written to disk and the image is included inline.

c5378a2858eb4cbfb87d821690173baae43887fc.name: Tool Result: Navigate Requires tabId For Back/Forward
c5378a2858eb4cbfb87d821690173baae43887fc.desc: Error tool-result returned to the model when it calls the browser navigate tool with url:"back"/"forward" without a tabId, directing it to call tabs_context_mcp first.

e07b029229a1ea9c1e7fd3de16a1080e5b21d739.name: Tool Result: Design Project Grant Mint Refused (404)
e07b029229a1ea9c1e7fd3de16a1080e5b21d739.desc: ClaudeDesign error message returned to the model when POST /v1/design/grants 404s, telling it the project cannot hold a durable write grant and to fall back to finalize_plan with a plan_token.

41296abc13c4dd5396ff79dc6d5235e0a93254be.name: Tool Result: Design finalize_plan scope "project" Unsupported
41296abc13c4dd5396ff79dc6d5235e0a93254be.desc: ClaudeDesign permission-deny message returned to the model when finalize_plan is called with scope "project", directing it to write directly or use path-scoped writes/deletes plans.

a63c12580ba7d4cdcb2a348da69d21dddf802274.name: Tool Result: Design copy_files Without plan_token Denied
a63c12580ba7d4cdcb2a348da69d21dddf802274.desc: ClaudeDesign permission-deny message returned to the model when copy_files is invoked without a plan_token, instructing it to declare every destination via finalize_plan writes.

c53a9f7db4f03bce766d3a9525adfc1e8509cb03.name: Tool Result: Design Call Names No Target Paths
c53a9f7db4f03bce766d3a9525adfc1e8509cb03.desc: ClaudeDesign permission-deny message returned to the model when a write batch declares an empty targets list, asking it to list files to write or use finalize_plan.

3e8869ac738e6072046007cc01ad1f32e217a922.name: Tool Result: Design Batch Too Large To Display For Approval
3e8869ac738e6072046007cc01ad1f32e217a922.desc: ClaudeDesign permission-deny message returned to the model when a write batch is too large to render for per-batch approval, telling it to split the batch or use finalize_plan.

b9ac6d000a044e9e1fdb3e10998f276368b2ee80.name: Tool Result: Design Batch Includes Reserved Paths
b9ac6d000a044e9e1fdb3e10998f276368b2ee80.desc: ClaudeDesign permission-deny message returned to the model when a batch touches paths that always require per-batch approval, directing it to finalize_plan with writes/deletes.

d7ac171985a484779a758168b35fe566a64f7d7e.name: Tool Result: Design Project Grant Unavailable (Non-Interactive)
d7ac171985a484779a758168b35fe566a64f7d7e.desc: ClaudeDesign permission-deny message returned to the model when a tokenless write needs a one-time interactive project approval that cannot be shown in a non-interactive session.

728e7e4071936887df2becd5fb5b99bcf9aa78ac.name: Tool Result: Design Project Grant Unavailable (Subagent/Hook)
728e7e4071936887df2becd5fb5b99bcf9aa78ac.desc: ClaudeDesign permission-deny message returned to the model when a tokenless write needs a one-time project approval unavailable in subagent or PermissionRequest-hook sessions.

0ffa86877aa01780e08d8a092bb4fcc4772e72d3.name: Tool Result: Design Project Cannot Hold Durable Write Grant
0ffa86877aa01780e08d8a092bb4fcc4772e72d3.desc: ClaudeDesign permission-deny message returned to the model when the target project_id is ineligible for a durable write grant (e.g. shared from another org), routing it to finalize_plan.

0b0f02e5436e527c1f6d82b0976e60d909ce919f.name: Tool Result: Design Project Approval Not Shown In Plan Mode
0b0f02e5436e527c1f6d82b0976e60d909ce919f.desc: ClaudeDesign permission-deny message returned to the model when a tokenless write needs a one-time project approval that plan mode will not display.

735b96a17a2e27faf78581007dbe4f2d15537afb.name: Tool Result: Design Write-Grant Check Unavailable
735b96a17a2e27faf78581007dbe4f2d15537afb.desc: ClaudeDesign permission-deny message returned to the model when the server cannot be probed for a durable project write grant, telling it to use finalize_plan instead.

2dfe4cf9383440f5579614ce80580f9bbeb5e13f.name: Tool Result: Design Project Approval Blocked By Permission Mode
2dfe4cf9383440f5579614ce80580f9bbeb5e13f.desc: ClaudeDesign permission-deny message returned to the model when a tokenless write to an ungranted project needs an interactive approval the current permission mode cannot show.

e13a8a0742a2968b99617b6d75b820498bf21752.name: Tool Description: RefreshMcpTools
e13a8a0742a2968b99617b6d75b820498bf21752.desc: Describes when and how to refresh connected MCP servers tool lists to recover missing or stale tools

e223ffd52931d0bb7d7b711dbf21317672e8acd9.name: Tool Description: RefreshMcpTools prompt
e223ffd52931d0bb7d7b711dbf21317672e8acd9.desc: Tool prompt for refreshing one or all connected MCP servers tool lists and interpreting per-server results

b83ea16a5ff8a161896e5f6dd81bce62bdb66e88.name: Tool Parameter: Claude in Chrome navigate tabId
b83ea16a5ff8a161896e5f6dd81bce62bdb66e88.desc: Description of the `tabId` parameter in the claude-in-chrome `navigate` tool's inputSchema, sent to the model as part of the browser tool definitions.

28a1361e505ab59dd2b324230710ce5adf423c5d.name: Tool Result: Claude in Chrome tabs_context_mcp Error Fallback
28a1361e505ab59dd2b324230710ce5adf423c5d.desc: Fallback tool-result text returned to the model when the hidden front-loaded tabs_context_mcp lookup errors and its error payload carries no content blocks.

9c7918c5ce53b9b6ed3e7aac87936e0f1f3ed8b3.name: Tool Result: Claude in Chrome tabs_context_mcp Timeout
9c7918c5ce53b9b6ed3e7aac87936e0f1f3ed8b3.desc: Tool-result error returned to the model when the front-loaded tabs_context_mcp lookup for a standalone navigate call times out, telling it to retry or call tabs_context_mcp explicitly.

3f3ac64e32b405f9475e4f5e52e56d704092f5ce.name: Tool Result: Projects OAuth Lock Contended
3f3ac64e32b405f9475e4f5e52e56d704092f5ce.desc: Precondition failure text returned by the Projects tool's auth-reason switch ($Jg) when another Claude Code process holds the OAuth refresh lock; thrown as ProjectsPreconditionError from the tool's call and delivered to the model inside a <tool_use_error> tool_result.

50cb09a8d686b4ee2e88f783b930d6224dbfecc2.name: Tool Result: browser_batch Sub-Action Must Be An Object
50cb09a8d686b4ee2e88f783b930d6224dbfecc2.desc: Validation error returned by prepareChromeFileUploadInput when a browser_batch action is not an object with a string name or nests browser_batch; surfaced to the model as a <tool_use_error> tool_result.

d78d5f0e719b6b93bbe04cee175d640a31735de8.name: Tool Result: browser_batch Sub-Action Name Invalid
d78d5f0e719b6b93bbe04cee175d640a31735de8.desc: Validation error returned when a browser_batch sub-action name contains non-printable-ASCII characters or aliases file_upload by case; surfaced to the model as a <tool_use_error> tool_result.

ad1302bbec32994e8126b63c4e4e210c91952604.name: Tool Result: file_upload Path Not Shared With Session
ad1302bbec32994e8126b63c4e4e210c91952604.desc: Rejection message built by Med(path) when a file_upload target resolves outside the session's allowed read roots or fails its attachment digest check; returned to the model as a <tool_use_error> tool_result instructing it to ask the user to share the file or run /add-dir.

6558b30dd7ac997b5f23c78a75829a525d5e6666.name: Tool Result: file_upload Requires Non-Empty paths
6558b30dd7ac997b5f23c78a75829a525d5e6666.desc: Validation error returned by Ned when file_upload is called without a non-empty `paths` array; surfaced to the model as a <tool_use_error> tool_result.

b9f85a4f1bc361835613c60a22f220d9bc748ee0.name: Tool Result: file_upload paths Entries Must Be Strings
b9f85a4f1bc361835613c60a22f220d9bc748ee0.desc: Validation error returned by Ned when a file_upload `paths` entry is not a string; surfaced to the model as a <tool_use_error> tool_result.

62deca302f2823723220c472b8b9c2cb13b5ee55.name: Tool Result: file_upload Target Not A Regular File
62deca302f2823723220c472b8b9c2cb13b5ee55.desc: Validation error returned by jiy when a file_upload path lstat's to something other than a regular file; surfaced to the model as a <tool_use_error> tool_result.

83dc01a2c6b773a7a4b4f17a6abf5abd5c51c68e.name: Tool Result: file_upload Blocked By Multiple Hard Links
83dc01a2c6b773a7a4b4f17a6abf5abd5c51c68e.desc: Rejection returned by jiy when an upload target has nlink>1 (e.g. node_modules stores that Bun/pnpm hard-link), explaining the aliasing risk and telling the model to copy the file and upload the copy; delivered as a <tool_use_error> tool_result.

f923c399f24b8ce19b925686fb5c17b512d5a14e.name: Tool Description: Task Background Subagent Notification
f923c399f24b8ce19b925686fb5c17b512d5a14e.desc: Conditional bullet in the Task/Agent tool description telling the model that subagents run in the background and that it must never fabricate a pending agent's results; injected as part of the Task tool's description field.

2717b0b1fde627804090243610343f8ed17c4f60.name: Data: Front-Loaded Tab Context Block
2717b0b1fde627804090243610343f8ed17c4f60.desc: Text block appending the front-loaded tabs_context_mcp JSON onto a browser MCP tool result, injected into the model's context as part of the tool result content.

aaf40dfed003a15d17467990e75da1c47c7092af.name: System Prompt: Fresh subagent delegation example
aaf40dfed003a15d17467990e75da1c47c7092af.desc: Provides an example of briefing a fresh specialized subagent with sufficient context and a specific reporting request

fed0dfc4912f37e843347faf52a241ab5b0a7ff4.name: Agent Prompt: Agent Namer Job Label
fed0dfc4912f37e843347faf52a241ab5b0a7ff4.desc: Side-call prompt asking a small model to produce a 2-4 word lowercase label for a background job, sent as the user message of the agent_namer query.

e4f29d69a75d4f66c15f8d85937ab6ede2206cf4.name: Tool Result: ClaudeDesign Project Identity Unverified Deny
e4f29d69a75d4f66c15f8d85937ab6ede2206cf4.desc: Denial message returned when a durable project write grant cannot be offered because the project identity could not be verified, instructing the model to read the project first or fall back to the finalize_plan/plan_token flow; delivered to the model as an is_error tool_result.

af0129e5b2be01fe65074f458a983900a234ba98.name: System Prompt: Foreground subagent delegation examples
af0129e5b2be01fe65074f458a983900a234ba98.desc: Provides foreground subagent examples showing self-contained task prompts and how to relay returned results

2b870d505aea23e7a6893fef13953016d44cd37e.name: Tool Result: file_upload Total Size Exceeded
2b870d505aea23e7a6893fef13953016d44cd37e.desc: Error returned when a Claude-in-Chrome file_upload exceeds the 10 MB browser-bridge budget, delivered to the model as a <tool_use_error> tool_result telling it to use a smaller file or split the upload.

92d84a49631d56e5531c7f2da05468a614c2371f.name: Tool Result: Design Write Requires plan_token
92d84a49631d56e5531c7f2da05468a614c2371f.desc: Permission-denial message returned to the model when a first-party Design MCP connector write is attempted without a plan_token, instructing it to call finalize_plan first.

8a4a178d236edb1581593394369c5dd787bb3d18.name: Slash Command: /config Consent-Gated Key Rejected
8a4a178d236edb1581593394369c5dd787bb3d18.desc: Message emitted when /config key=value tries to enable a consent-gated setting, telling the user to open the /config panel; returned as the command's text output and injected as <local-command-stdout>.

fefa4baa36222e5aa03c15784ac223300d755b3d.name: Slash Command: /terminal-setup Description (Apple Terminal)
fefa4baa36222e5aa03c15784ac223300d755b3d.desc: The /terminal-setup command description shown on macOS Apple Terminal; injected into the model's context as a line of the 'Available commands' block in the claude-code skill/guide-agent system prompt.

23cf1e464e40e692025e7749276f6743538c5c9a.name: Slash Command: /terminal-setup Description (Native Shift+Enter)
23cf1e464e40e692025e7749276f6743538c5c9a.desc: The /terminal-setup command description used when the terminal (Ghostty/Kitty/Warp/WezTerm/Windows Terminal) natively supports Shift+Enter; injected into the model's context via the 'Available commands' block.

46d17b7916c1baeed44f13e2397436173abbfa48.name: Slash Command: Claude for Enterprise Upsell
46d17b7916c1baeed44f13e2397436173abbfa48.desc: Text returned when an API-key user invokes a Claude-for-Enterprise-only slash command, telling them to ask their admin about migrating; injected into the model's context as <local-command-stdout>.

ffee5e9e2a32f405b83aba56662b60c398f86496.name: Slash Command: Usage-Credits Admin Request Sent
ffee5e9e2a32f405b83aba56662b60c398f86496.desc: Confirmation emitted after a usage-credit limit-increase request is sent to the org admin; surfaced via the local-jsx command's onDone and injected as <local-command-stdout>.

8ba2aee3d04154dc079fecb71e56645ee7356316.name: Data: Agent Import — Codex Hooks Unmappable
8ba2aee3d04154dc079fecb71e56645ee7356316.desc: Reason text for the unmapped Codex `hooks` setting; user-scope unmappable reasons are interpolated into the `/import` query prompt (BA_) and into the generated import-to-claude-code SKILL.md body.

6a7c8b81b6ade8e3c260f8c589ce22b3c6f27ada.name: Data: Agent Import — User-Scope Root Redirected
6a7c8b81b6ade8e3c260f8c589ce22b3c6f27ada.desc: Reason text emitted when the user-scope read/write root is redirected; pushed as a user-scope unmappable and injected into the `/import` prompt and the fallback SKILL.md.

ce7e8d99cbda9f67748fa51eb3c3f514b14192c9.name: Data: Agent Import — Shell Block Missing Leading Whitespace
ce7e8d99cbda9f67748fa51eb3c3f514b14192c9.desc: `untranslatable` reason from the Gemini command translator; becomes a user-scope unmappable reason injected into the `/import` prompt and the import-to-claude-code SKILL.md.

888992d98dd7d967a96180c109a45793fbf88cce.name: Data: Agent Import — Translation Would Introduce Shell Exec
888992d98dd7d967a96180c109a45793fbf88cce.desc: `untranslatable` reason when translation would make an inert Gemini string execute a shell command; surfaced as a user-scope unmappable in the `/import` prompt and SKILL.md.

f7c29ba5eb4f97a7f1a035c193c0fa3c189d9ba5.name: Data: Agent Import — Gemini mcpServers Unexpected Shape
f7c29ba5eb4f97a7f1a035c193c0fa3c189d9ba5.desc: User-scope unmappable reason for a malformed `mcpServers` block in ~/.gemini/settings.json; injected into the `/import` prompt and the fallback SKILL.md.

ca1b407304c6338817140e9c7085e754d348d216.name: Data: Agent Import — Gemini MCP Entry Unexpected Shape
ca1b407304c6338817140e9c7085e754d348d216.desc: User-scope unmappable reason for a single malformed MCP server entry in ~/.gemini/settings.json; injected into the `/import` prompt and SKILL.md.

9c17c7eb69875d81d79a3e2483f0e27cc6d8b780.name: Data: Agent Import — Namespaced Commands Not Imported
9c17c7eb69875d81d79a3e2483f0e27cc6d8b780.desc: User-scope unmappable reason for subdirectory-organized foreign slash commands; injected into the `/import` prompt and the import-to-claude-code SKILL.md.

4b1d7b36a68395017bb4408fa9cddeabfe7d637d.name: Data: Agent Import — Command TOML Unparseable
4b1d7b36a68395017bb4408fa9cddeabfe7d637d.desc: User-scope unmappable reason when a foreign command file cannot be parsed as TOML; injected into the `/import` prompt and SKILL.md.

34b45faeb294c291a5b33e943eaf2e512d39e35a.name: Data: Agent Import — Command Missing Prompt Field
34b45faeb294c291a5b33e943eaf2e512d39e35a.desc: User-scope unmappable reason when a foreign command lacks the expected `prompt` string; injected into the `/import` prompt and SKILL.md.

9240584f075b5773b4f2a644f2b44092908982ff.name: Data: Agent Import — Source Scan Failed Warning
9240584f075b5773b4f2a644f2b44092908982ff.desc: Warning emitted when a foreign agent's config can't be read; joined into BA_'s `value`, which the local-command dispatcher wraps as `Ur({content:'<local-command-stdout>…'})` — a real user message in the API request.

9d41cd44aecff2d12368cdbe4519971b33062eac.name: Data: Agent Import — Do Not Read Foreign Config Guardrail
9d41cd44aecff2d12368cdbe4519971b33062eac.desc: Guardrail sentence (xdd) appended to the `/import` query prompt and interpolated into the /init CLAUDE.md generation prompt, telling the model not to read foreign-agent config itself.

48363b942ef715001f139251547c5cc82d84e24c.name: Data: Agent Import — Offer To Import Guidance
48363b942ef715001f139251547c5cc82d84e24c.desc: Instruction block (wCs) interpolated into the /init CLAUDE.md-generation prompt telling the model how to offer `/import` when a Codex or Gemini config is detected.

7523f296f3b6c16138d8d8673756182e74cf1e1b.name: Data: Agent Import — Headless Scan Intro
7523f296f3b6c16138d8d8673756182e74cf1e1b.desc: Opening line of the `/import` query prompt (BA_), delivered to the model as an isMeta user message when the surface has no interactive picker.

867ab10600ab8fb29b037abe23abbea61736b0d0.name: Data: Agent Import — Untrusted Labels Notice
867ab10600ab8fb29b037abe23abbea61736b0d0.desc: Second half of the prompt-injection warning in the `/import` query prompt, telling the model that item labels copied from foreign config are data, not instructions.

6b57ad8ce900c3a586415c3cbcc11bb6701bd29e.name: Data: Agent Import — Project-Scope Config Held Back
6b57ad8ce900c3a586415c3cbcc11bb6701bd29e.desc: Prompt line explaining that project-level foreign config is neither listed nor imported by `--yes`; part of the `/import` query prompt sent to the model.

89a6c3895d560a24386e60785e1d6daf75aefad9.name: Data: Agent Import — Summarise Instruction
89a6c3895d560a24386e60785e1d6daf75aefad9.desc: Directive in the `/import` query prompt telling the model to summarise the scan in its own words and ask the user how to proceed.

4b98a818a0e5ab072d58ecde238ff9dfb4dc6705.name: Data: Agent Import — Apply User Items Option
4b98a818a0e5ab072d58ecde238ff9dfb4dc6705.desc: Prompt bullet the model relays to the user, describing the `/import … --yes` reply that imports user-level items.

db1e3b839bd2576de8ae25430e29317f319bc7e9.name: Data: Agent Import — Fallback Skill Option
db1e3b839bd2576de8ae25430e29317f319bc7e9.desc: Prompt bullet in the `/import` query prompt explaining that `--yes` also writes the import-to-claude-code reference skill for unmapped items.

d8392eeadb9c4f27ba8537a6142094ccc9576e6a.name: Data: Agent Import — Terminal Picker Option
